title: Smoke-Cold Portuguese Paella Rice Paella
description: A floral, crunchy, and nostalgic Portuguese dish featuring paella rice, smoked with cold air for a unique flavor experience
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly browned.
Add the shrimp and cook for 1-2 minutes, until pink.
Add the mussels and cook for 1-2 minutes, until opened.
Add the paella rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the seafood.
Add the smoked paprika, lemon zest, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the white wine and water, and stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Transfer the pan to a cold area, such as a garage or a shaded area, and allow to cool and smoke for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges and parsley.
